creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #5)
Torsten, the maintainer-feedback? was automatically set and emailed to the maintainer upon submission so we are over the 2 week timeout period. Consider this 'Approved by: maintainer timeout (3 weeks)' and mentor approved. The maintainer would typically add the maintainer-approval+ when they submit a maintainer update and that would show up in the list of ready to apply PRs.
